title: Lifting App
description: A production-style workout tracking system designed to simulate real-world backend architecture. Supports authenticated workout sessions, structured relational data, and performance analytics including total volume and estimated 1RM.

title: Liberty Athletic Club
description: A full redesign for Liberty Athletic Club featuring modern layouts, GSAP-driven motion, a custom Sanity CMS, and a brand-consistent visual identity. Built for real-world use with mobile-first UX, optimized images, and smooth page transitions.

title: Alert Arrival
description: An award-winning automotive safety prototype built during GrizzHacks 6. Uses Python + OpenCV to detect vehicle arrival events and sends real-time alerts through a Flutter mobile interface. Designed to explore rapid-response safety workflows in automotive environments.

title: Potts Photography
description: A complete photography e-commerce experience with Stripe checkout, album management, CMS-driven content, and cinematic page reveals. Designed to feel elegant and premium while supporting real print sales.

title: Job Portal Platform
description: A full-stack job application platform built with modern authentication, role-based views, company dashboards, and a clean mobile-first UI. Includes job browsing, posting, application tracking, and real-time updates using Firebase.
